_note: Status 'mapped' means the component has been mapped to this criterion. It does not mean the criterion has been verified by a formal audit. Run audit-rules.json checks and update validation_status before changing overall_status.

criteria.title: Non-text Content
criteria.evidence: Icon-only buttons carry aria-label on the root element. Buttons with visible text satisfy this unconditionally. The SVG inside .btn__icon carries aria-hidden='true' to suppress redundant announcements.

criteria.title: Contrast (Minimum)
criteria.evidence: Primary variant: #FFF on #1B8354 = ~5.27:1 (threshold 4.5:1). Disabled state: #9DA4AE on #E5E7EB = ~2.1:1 — exempt per WCAG 1.4.3 exception for inactive UI components. Other variants require per-deployment verification against actual background.

criteria.title: Non-text Contrast
criteria.evidence: Solid-background variants (primary, neutral, secondary-solid) pass via sufficient background-to-page contrast. secondary-outline border (#D2D6DB on #FFF) = ~1.6:1 — below 3:1 threshold. See variant_compliance_notes for remediation path.

criteria.title: Keyboard
criteria.evidence: Native <button> element is keyboard operable by default (Enter and Space). When rendered as <a role='button'>, Space key handling must be added via JavaScript. BTN-STRUCT-001 enforces native element usage to minimise this risk.

criteria.title: Focus Visible
criteria.evidence: Two-layer focus ring: outer border on root element + inner border via ::after pseudo-element. Focus styles are defined in button.css. Suppression via outline:none is caught by BTN-A11Y-004.

criteria.title: Name, Role, Value
criteria.evidence: Role: implicit from <button> element. Name: enforced by BTN-A11Y-001. Toggle state: enforced by BTN-A11Y-003 (aria-pressed). Expandable trigger: requires aria-expanded + aria-controls, not yet audited automatically.

standards.name: Platform Design System Internal Standards
standards._note: These are internal platform rules. IDs are stable across components. See standards/platform-code.standards.json for full definitions.

criteria.title: Component must use design tokens for all visual values
criteria.evidence: All color, spacing, radius, and font values in button.css reference CSS custom properties from token.css. Hardcoded value detection is enforced by BTN-TOKEN-001 (error severity).

criteria.title: RTL layout support is mandatory
criteria.evidence: button.css uses padding-inline, gap, and [dir='rtl'] selectors. Physical properties (padding-left/right) are forbidden and caught by BTN-RTL-001.

criteria.title: One primary action per visual group
criteria.evidence: Hierarchy rule is documented in button.contract.md §5. BTN-USAGE-001 warns when multiple .btn--primary elements appear in the same ancestor scope.

criteria.title: Semantic HTML element required
criteria.evidence: button.contract.md §4 specifies <button> and <a> as the only valid root elements. BTN-STRUCT-001 enforces this at the DOM level.

criteria.title: Minimum touch target 24×24px
criteria.evidence: Small size (--sm) height token is --button-sm-height (24px). Icon-only small uses the same token for both width and height. No automated audit rule yet — pending touch target checker implementation.

standards.name: Platform Accessibility Internal Standards
standards._note: Accessibility-specific internal standards. See standards/accessibility.standards.json for full definitions.

criteria.title: Arabic language font support required
criteria.evidence: IBM Plex Sans Arabic is applied via --button-label-font-family token. All text slots inherit this token. No override to a Latin-only font is present in button.css.

criteria.title: Label language must match document language context
criteria.evidence: Cannot be verified automatically. Marked for manual review in audit report. Documented in button.contract.md §7 (Content Rules).

variant_compliance_notes.secondary-outline: WCAG 1.4.11: border #D2D6DB on white = ~1.6:1, below the 3:1 threshold. Remediation: increase border token to --gray-400 (#9DA4AE) or darker. Do not use on white backgrounds until resolved.
variant_compliance_notes.primary-on-color: WCAG 1.4.11: white button (#FFF) on colored background must achieve 3:1 contrast against the background. Verify contrast ratio per deployment context.
variant_compliance_notes.transparent: WCAG 1.4.11 does not apply (no background or border). WCAG 1.4.3 still applies: text color must contrast at 4.5:1 against actual background behind the button.
variant_compliance_notes.disabled (all variants): WCAG 1.4.3 exempts inactive UI components. Low contrast of disabled state is intentional and compliant per the WCAG exemption.
